contribution.title: Toolmetry AI Training Data - Public Contribution
contribution.description: Add your patterns and responses here! This file is for community contributions.
instructions: Add new categories to the knowledgeBase object
Each category needs 'patterns' (array of keywords) and 'responses' (en/hi)

responses.en: This is an example response. Replace it with your own!
responses.hi: Ye ek example response hai. Isse apne se replace karein!
